hero.title: A parish identity carried by people, hospitality, and shared work
hero.lede: Parish life at St Nick's holds together councils, ministry teams, catechesis, outreach, and welcome for people who arrive from many different walks of life.

intro.title: Community life beyond the sanctuary
intro.body: The parish's public mission connects liturgy with practical service: food support, refugee accompaniment, youth-led worship, catechesis, and leadership shared across the community.
intro.asideBody: Borderlands works from the Assisi Centre, Lawford's Gate, Bristol, BS5 0RE. Enquiries: enquiries.borderlands@gmail.com.

cards.title: Parish Groups
items: Parish Pastoral Council and Parish Finance Committee
Community Stewards, Community Elders, and Servant Leaders
Catechists and Children's Liturgy of the Word volunteers
Lay Ministers of the Eucharist and monthly youth-led Mass ministry
Deaf community, LGBTQ+ Mass community, and Clifton Catholic Fellowship
Ethiopian Orthodox Community hosted at St Nick's

cards.title: Foodbank
paragraphs: St Nicholas Bread provides food and practical help for people struggling with money, food, and utilities.

cards.title: Refugee / Borderlands Work
paragraphs: The parish mission explicitly includes support for refugees, asylum seekers, and people facing exclusion.
items: Borderlands partnership based at the Assisi Centre
Support for homeless and poor neighbours
Pastoral links with the Wild Goose Cafe
Parish involvement with One25 and Alabare CCC / The Well

cards.title: Parish Activities
paragraphs: Recent parish diary items include pastoral council meetings, finance committee meetings, diocesan celebrations, and Bishop Bosco's visit.
The mission page also notes parish support for self-help gatherings such as AA and Over-eaters Anonymous.

cards.title: Gallery
paragraphs: The parish gallery includes baptisms, first Eucharist, confirmation, the 170 Anniversary, and community celebration images.
